questions.stem: The post office offered NT$575 in ______ for the lost registered letter.
questions.explain: compensation 補償／賠償，claim compensation for… 為固定搭配。communication 通訊、competition 競爭、combination 組合，語意皆不合。

questions.point: 文法：關係代名詞所有格
questions.stem: The applicant ______ resume impressed the manager was hired immediately.
questions.explain: 空格後接名詞 resume，表「他的履歷」，需用所有格關係代名詞 whose。who 作主詞、whom 作受詞、which 用於事物，皆不可直接接名詞表所有。

questions.stem: Foreign currency exchange service is ______ at all major branches.
questions.explain: available 可取得的、可利用的（服務、商品）。capable 有能力的（人）、probable 可能的（事件發生機率）、comfortable 舒適的，均不符「服務可供使用」語意。

questions.stem: The new regulation will take effect ______ March 1.
questions.explain: 明確日期用 on（on March 1）；月份、年份用 in（in March）；時刻用 at（at 9:00）。

questions.stem: The ______ must show a valid ID card when picking up the registered mail.
questions.explain: recipient 收件人（人）。reception 接待／收訊、receipt 收據、recipe 食譜——四字形近，考試常互為誘答，以「人／物」區分最快。

questions.stem: The delivery was delayed ______ the heavy typhoon.
questions.explain: because of ＋名詞片語（the heavy typhoon）；because 後接完整子句。although 表讓步、so that 表目的，語意不合。

questions.stem: This coupon will ______ at the end of June, so please use it soon.
questions.explain: expire 到期、失效（票券、證件、契約）。expand 擴大、explore 探索、export 出口，字首相同易混。

questions.stem: All parcels ______ carefully before they are loaded onto the truck.
questions.explain: 包裹是「被檢查」，需用被動語態 are inspected。主詞 parcels 與 inspect 為被動關係，A、C、D 皆為主動形式。

questions.stem: She went to the post office to ______ her salary into the savings account.
questions.explain: deposit 存入（款項）；deposit money into an account 為常見搭配。dispose 處置（dispose of）、deserve 應得、describe 描述。

questions.stem: Could you tell me ______?
options: where is the nearest post office
where the nearest post office is
the nearest post office is where
where does the nearest post office
questions.explain: 間接問句採「疑問詞＋主詞＋動詞」的直述句語序：where the nearest post office is。A 是直接問句語序，置於 tell me 之後不合文法。

questions.stem: Please send the documents by express mail; the matter is quite ______.
questions.explain: urgent 緊急的，與 express mail（快捷）語意呼應。vacant 空的、distant 遙遠的、instant 立即的（instant noodles），-ant 結尾形近誘答。

questions.stem: There isn't ______ information about the new service on the website yet.
questions.explain: information 為不可數名詞，否定句用 much。many、a few、several 皆修飾可數複數名詞。

questions.stem: She is not ready to make a lifelong _____, so she decided not to marry him.
questions.explain: commitment 承諾（make a commitment 固定搭配）。devotion 奉獻、investment 投資、donation 捐贈。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: The police officer said playing loud music after midnight _____ noise laws.
questions.explain: violate 違反（法律）。enforce 是「執行」法律，方向相反；stimulate 刺激、create 創造。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Higher temperatures and lack of snow is causing the _____ of the glaciers.
questions.explain: retreat 後退、消退（冰川消退）。formation 形成、complexity 複雜性、splendor 壯麗。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: That old man lives on the street and has no _____.
questions.explain: residence 住所（人）。habitat 是動植物的棲息地，不用於人；insistence 堅持、relation 關係。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: To get onto a stage and speak to a crowd is a big _____ to a shy person.
questions.explain: challenge 挑戰。上台演說對害羞者是一大挑戰。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: When Chris copied a research paper he found on the Internet, it was _____.
questions.explain: deliberate 蓄意的（抄襲是故意行為）。innocent 無辜的、efficient 有效率的、credible 可信的。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: I must _____ this poor and unfair request from my boss.
questions.explain: refuse 拒絕（不公平的要求）。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: People in this country are suffering from hunger because of a _____ of food and water.
questions.explain: shortage 短缺（a shortage of food 糧食短缺）。注意 -age 結尾字的字義區辨。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: James is so _____ to video games that he plays them for 8 hours almost every day!
questions.explain: be addicted to 對……上癮（固定搭配 to）。offended 被冒犯、frightened 受驚嚇。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: My friend tried to _____ me to invest in something I don't feel safe, but I said no.
questions.explain: persuade sb to V 說服某人做某事。invade 入侵、tolerate 容忍、hesitate 猶豫。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: The man is _____ as he lives a very simple life and wouldn't spend one penny on anything unnecessary.
questions.explain: thrifty 節儉的。lavish 揮霍的（反義）、fragile 脆弱的、stinky 發臭的。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Before going out, always _____ your parents of your plans.
questions.explain: inform sb of sth 告知某人某事（介系詞 of 是關鍵搭配）。tell 接雙受詞不加 of。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Justin bought a new book which he found very _____ and he finished reading it in one day.
questions.explain: 修飾「書」用現在分詞 interesting（令人感興趣的）；interested 用於人（感到興趣的）。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Some entertainers are facing _____ of sexual assault as controversies rock show business this month.
questions.explain: allegation 指控（face allegations of... 面臨……的指控）。delegation 代表團、testimony 證詞、demonstration 示威。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: The _____ reports published by large-scaled companies each year can serve as a good reference for the investors.
questions.explain: fiscal 財務的、會計的（fiscal report 財務報告）。金融情境高頻字，郵政儲匯英文常考。（112 歷屆）

questions.point: 文法：名詞子句疑問詞 how
questions.stem: It is difficult to imagine _____ our personal and business affairs could be carried on without smartphones.
questions.explain: 語意：難以想像事務「如何」在沒有手機下運作——用 how 引導名詞子句；what 在子句中缺乏對應缺格。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: The African plantations provide almost 70% of the world's cacao, _____ with 5% from Mexico.
questions.explain: compared with 相較於（過去分詞構句，主詞與 compare 為被動關係）。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: It _____ years for the newborns to master all the necessary skills for daily life.
questions.explain: It takes＋時間＋for sb to V 固定句型。spend 主詞須是人；cost 用於金錢代價。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: I have met that man before. I wish I _____ his name.
questions.explain: wish 表「與現在事實相反」的願望用過去式助動詞：I wish I could remember（現在想不起來）。had remembered 是與過去事實相反。（112 歷屆）

questions.point: 文法：過去式疑問句 Did
questions.stem: _____ you call me yesterday? I left my cellphone in my brother's place.
questions.explain: yesterday＋一般動詞 call → 過去式疑問句用 Did。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: I'm not interested _____ any sports at all.
questions.explain: be interested in 對……感興趣，固定介系詞搭配。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: The lid of the jar seemed stuck. Do you mind _____ it?
questions.explain: mind 後接動名詞 V-ing（mind opening）。同類動詞：enjoy、finish、avoid、practice。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: _____ is my favorite pastime.
questions.explain: 動名詞片語當主詞，且 listen 為不及物動詞須接 to：Listening to music。（112 歷屆）

questions.point: 文法：分詞構句 when told
questions.stem: When _____ about the bad news, Georgia was so shocked that she fainted right away.
questions.explain: Georgia 是「被告知」，用過去分詞：When (she was) told about...。（112 歷屆）

questions.point: 文法：關係代名詞 which 指事件
questions.stem: At the age of ten, Michael lost his parents, _____ he considered the most traumatic in his life.
questions.explain: 先行詞是「失去雙親」這件事（非人），非限定用法用 which。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Yesterday, I _____ dinner with an old friend.
questions.explain: yesterday 明確過去時間，用過去簡單式 had；不可用完成式。（112 歷屆）

questions.point: 文法：所有格比較 as good as
questions.stem: Your cooking skills are as good as _____.
questions.explain: 比較對象是「你媽媽的廚藝」（skills），須用所有格 your mother's（＝your mother's skills），與人比較會語意不對等。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Experts point out that love is a complex process, with many factors _____ in finding and keeping a partner.
questions.explain: with＋受詞＋分詞的獨立結構：factors 是「被牽涉」的，用過去分詞 involved（be involved in）。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Teenagers are often rebellious and can easily get fed up _____ doing house chores.
questions.explain: be/get fed up with 對……感到厭煩，固定搭配 with。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: Tim and Jacob have been friends since they were in kindergarten, and the two _____ really well.
questions.explain: get on (well) 相處融洽（＝get along）。run over 輾過、turn up 出現、come up 被提出。（112 歷屆）

questions.stem: The senior clerk gave me _____ useful advice on handling registered mail.
questions.explain: advice 為不可數名詞，量的修飾用 much；many、a few、several 只能修飾可數複數名詞。information、furniture 同屬此類——曾錯考點。

questions.stem: The company will _____ more budget to improving parcel delivery services next year.
questions.explain: allocate 分配（allocate＋資源＋to＋用途，把資源分配給某用途）。decorate 裝飾、hesitate 猶豫、celebrate 慶祝，語意均不合。

questions.stem: The post office will _____ a new mobile payment service next month.
questions.explain: launch 推出、發起（新產品或服務），為郵政情境常用字。punish 處罰、rescue 救援、borrow 借入。

questions.stem: Please keep the receipt as _____ of payment in case you need a refund.
questions.explain: proof of payment 付款證明，固定搭配。pride 驕傲、praise 讚美、price 價格。

questions.stem: _____ the heavy rain, the mail carrier delivered all the parcels on time.
questions.explain: 空格後接名詞片語 the heavy rain，須用介系詞 despite；although、because、unless 為連接詞，後面須接完整子句。despite／in spite of＋名詞，although＋子句——曾錯考點。

questions.stem: The meeting was _____ until next Friday because the manager was on sick leave.
questions.explain: postpone 延期（postpone…until… 延到某時），語意唯一合理。purchase 購買、polish 擦亮、persuade 說服。

questions.stem: This is the counter _____ you can pick up registered letters.
questions.explain: 先行詞 the counter 為地點，且後方子句 you can pick up registered letters 結構完整（不缺主詞受詞），用關係副詞 where。which 須在子句中充當主詞或受詞，此處不成立。

questions.stem: Please make sure the parcel's _____ address is written clearly.
questions.explain: destination 目的地（destination address 收件地址），郵務常用字。decoration 裝飾、definition 定義、donation 捐贈。

questions.stem: Ms. Lin has worked at the post office _____ more than ten years.
questions.explain: 現在完成式搭配「一段時間」用 for（for more than ten years）；since 後接「起始時間點」（since 2015）。during 後接特定名詞時段、from 需與 to 搭配。

questions.stem: You must pay the insurance _____ every month to keep the policy effective.
questions.explain: premium 保險費，與 policy（保單）同為簡易壽險情境高頻字。pension 退休金、penalty 罰款、passenger 乘客。

questions.stem: The sooner you mail the package, _____ it will arrive.
questions.explain: 「the＋比較級…, the＋比較級…」表「越…就越…」，前後兩半都要有 the 與比較級，故空格用 the sooner。最高級 soonest 不用於此句型。

questions.stem: For further _____ about postal rates, please call our service hotline.
questions.explain: inquiry 詢問（for further inquiry 如需進一步詢問），客服情境常用。injury 受傷、industry 產業、identity 身分。

questions.stem: The clerk suggested _____ the fragile items with bubble wrap before shipping.
questions.explain: suggest 後接動名詞 V-ing（suggest doing），不接不定詞。同類動詞：mind、enjoy、finish、avoid、consider——與 mind＋V-ing 為同一組考點。

questions.stem: This coupon is _____ until the end of December.
questions.explain: valid 有效的（be valid until… 有效期限至…），與 expire（到期）互為正反面考點。vacant 空的、violent 暴力的、visual 視覺的。

questions.stem: Neither the manager nor the clerks _____ aware of the schedule change.
questions.explain: neither…nor 連接兩個主詞時，動詞與「最接近」的主詞一致；最近主詞為複數 the clerks，且語境為過去，故用 were。

questions.stem: The staff held a _____ party for the retiring postmaster who had served for thirty years.
questions.explain: farewell 歡送、告別（farewell party 歡送會），與 retiring（即將退休）呼應。wedding 婚禮、birthday 生日、costume 化裝（舞會），語意不合。

questions.stem: Housing prices _____ sharply after the new tax policy was announced.
questions.explain: plunge 暴跌，與 sharply 搭配表急遽下滑；soar、ascend、surge 都是「上升、飆漲」，方向相反——原典型考法即以三個同義上升詞作誘答。

questions.stem: I only took a quick _____ at the notice board, so I missed the details of the schedule change.
questions.explain: glance 一瞥（take a glance at 匆匆看一眼），與 quick 及後句 missed the details 呼應。term 期間／術語、stroll 漫步、circuit 環道。

questions.stem: Mobile payments are now widely accepted in _____ stores across the country.
questions.explain: retail 零售（retail store 零售商店）。curtail 縮減、detail 細節、entail 使必需——三者皆與 -tail 結尾形近，屬形似字誘答。

questions.stem: Please _____ your appointment two days in advance, or it will be cancelled automatically.
questions.explain: confirm 確認（confirm an appointment 確認預約）。conform 遵從（conform to）、reform 改革、inform 通知（inform 人 of 事）——四個 -form 形近字為歷屆常見誘答組。

questions.stem: Due to the _____ typhoon warning, all mail deliveries were suspended for two days.
questions.explain: severe 嚴重的、劇烈的（severe weather 惡劣天氣），與停止投遞之因果相合。timid 膽小的、vital 極重要的、prompt 迅速的。

questions.stem: Elderly customers are more _____ to telephone scams, so counter clerks are trained to remind them.
questions.explain: vulnerable 易受害的（be vulnerable to 容易受到…傷害）。remarkable 出色的、knowledgeable 知識豐富的、indispensable 不可或缺的——四字皆 -able 結尾，考語意辨析。

questions.stem: You should avoid _____ personal information to strangers over the phone.
questions.explain: avoid 後接動名詞 V-ing（avoid doing），不接不定詞。同組動詞：mind、enjoy、finish、suggest、consider，為歷屆固定考點。

questions.stem: Many people have trouble _____ all their passwords for different accounts.
questions.explain: have trouble／difficulty／a hard time＋V-ing 為固定句型（介系詞 in 省略），故用 remembering，不接不定詞。

questions.stem: _____ the postage, you also need to pay an insurance fee for valuable items.
questions.explain: aside from＝apart from＝in addition to 除了…之外（還有），後接名詞。as soon as 一…就（接子句）、as far as 就…而言；apart 須搭配 from，並無 apart in 之用法。
